Zenith Mobile Labs

Building intuitive, performant iOS experiences that connect people seamlessly

Now Hiring: Senior iOS Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) · Full-time · $165,000 - $220,000 per year

W

e're seeking an experienced Senior iOS Engineer to lead the development and architecture of our

flagship productivity app. In this role, you'll mentor junior engineers, drive technical decisions, and

implement complex features that impact millions of users. You should have 5-8 years of professional iOS

development experience, with deep expertise in Swift, SwiftUI, and modern iOS architectures. You'll work

collaboratively with product, design, and backend teams to deliver exceptional user experiences on tight
timelines.

A B O U T U S

Zenith Mobile Labs is a mid-sized mobile-first technology company founded in 2018, specializing in

consumer-facing iOS applications with a focus on performance optimization and user experience design. We

serve over 5 million active users across our suite of lifestyle and productivity apps. Our engineering team is

distributed across North America and Europe, with a strong culture of technical excellence and continuous

learning.

Y O U R R O L E

Design and implement complex iOS features using Swift and SwiftUI, focusing on performance,

accessibility, and maintainability

Lead architectural decisions for new modules and refactor existing codebases to improve scalability and

testability

Mentor 2-3 junior iOS engineers, providing code reviews, technical guidance, and career development
support

Collaborate with product managers and designers to translate requirements into technical specifications and

feasibility assessments

Optimize app performance using Instruments and Core Data, reducing memory footprint and improving

launch times

Implement complex state management using Combine and MVVM patterns, ensuring reactive and resilient

UIs

Own the full lifecycle of features from design through App Store deployment, including release

management and post-launch monitoring

Participate in on-call rotation for production support, diagnosing and resolving critical issues affecting user
experience

 R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

5-8 years of professional iOS development experience with proven shipping of apps on the App Store

Expert-level proficiency in Swift and solid understanding of Objective-C fundamentals

Strong experience with modern UI frameworks including SwiftUI and UIKit, with ability to make informed
trade-off decisions

Demonstrated expertise with Core Data or similar persistence frameworks, including schema migrations and

performance optimization

Solid understanding of reactive programming patterns using Combine, RxSwift, or similar frameworks

Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and familiarity with testing frameworks (XCTest, Quick, Nimble)

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience with advanced iOS features including push notifications, background modes, and deep linking

Familiarity with SwiftUI and modern concurrency patterns (async/await)

Experience mentoring or leading other engineers

Contribution to open-source iOS projects or published technical content

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, Xcode, Combine, Core Data, MVVM Architecture, XCTest, App Store Connect, Grand

Central Dispatch (GCD)

W E O F F E R

Competitive salary with annual performance bonuses (10-15% of base)

Comprehensive health insurance (medical, dental, vision) with 100% coverage for employee premium

401(k) matching up to 6% of salary

Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 20 days encouraged annually

Professional development budget of $3,000 per year for conferences, courses, and certifications

MacBook Pro (latest generation) and equipment budget for home office setup

Remote-flexible work arrangement: 3 days in office, 2 days remote

T O A P P LY

Submit your resume, a cover letter describing your most challenging iOS project, and a link to your GitHub

profile or portfolio of shipped apps to careers@zenithmobilelabs.com. Selected candidates will participate in a

technical phone screen followed by 3 rounds of interviews including system design, coding, and team culture

fit assessments.
